features.name: Animate Effects
features.description: Opens timeline to add sound and particle effects

features.name: Animation Onion Skin
features.description: Display an wireframe view of a different frame in the animation for reference

features.name: Bake Animation Pose into Model
features.description: Bake the currently displayed animation frame into the model. Only applies rotation and position, scale is ignored.
routes: Animation > Bake Animation Pose into Model

features.name: Bake Inverse Kinematics
features.description: Bake the rotations applied by inverse kinematics into the selected animation

features.name: Copy Animation Pose
features.description: Copy all keyframes to replicate the current animation pose

features.name: Export Animations...
features.description: Export a selection of animations into a new file

features.name: Flip Animation
features.description: Flips part of an animation by copying selected keyframes to the other side of the model

features.name: Import Animations
features.description: Import an animation file
routes: View > Panels > Animations > Panel Menu > Import Animations

features.name: Lock Motion Trail
features.description: Lock the motion trail to the currently selected group

features.name: Merge Animation
features.description: Merge the animation into another animation

features.name: Optimize Animation
features.description: Optimize the current animation and reduce the keyframe count

features.name: Retarget Animations
features.description: Select which animator targets which bone or element

features.name: Save All Animations
features.description: Save all currently loaded animations
routes: View > Panels > Animations > Panel Menu > Save All Animations

features.name: Set Marker
features.description: Set a timeline marker

features.name: Motion Trails
features.description: Show motion trails in the animation editor

features.name: Apply Preset
features.description: Apply a default or custom display setting preset

features.name: New Preset
features.description: Add a new display setting preset

features.name: Add Element
features.description: Add a new element from the list of element types
routes: View > Panels > Outliner > Panel Menu > Add Element

features.name: Add Group
features.description: Adds a new group or bone
routes: View > Panels > Outliner > Panel Menu > Add Group

features.name: Apply Mirror Modeling
features.description: Apply Mirror Modeling to the selection. All selected elements will be copied and flipped across the X axis.

features.name: Edit History...
features.description: View the editing history and undo or redo steps

features.name: Find/Replace...
features.description: Find and replace parts of names

features.name: Invert Selection
features.description: Invert the current selection

features.name: Mirror Modeling
features.description: Enable Mirror Modeling on the X axis. All changes you make in the viewport will be reflected to the other side, unless specifically disabled on the element.

features.name: Proportional Editing
features.description: Proportionally affect surrounding vertices when editing parts of a mesh

features.name: Redo
features.description: Reverts the last undo

features.name: Rename
features.description: Change the name of the selected elements or group

features.name: Select All
routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Select All
View > Panels > Outliner > Panel Menu > Select All

features.name: Select...
features.description: Search and select elements based on their properties

features.name: Undo
features.description: Undoes the last change

features.name: Unlock All
features.description: Unlock all groups and elements in the outliner.

features.name: Close Project
features.description: Closes the currently open project

features.name: Convert Project
features.description: Converts the current project to a project for another model format

features.name: Download Archive
features.description: Download an archive with the model and all textures in it

features.name: Edit Session...
features.description: Connect to an edit session to collaborate with other users

features.name: Export Bedrock Entity
features.description: Export the model as an entity model for Minecraft Bedrock Edition

features.name: Export Bedrock Geometry
features.description: Export the model as a bedrock edition geometry file.

features.name: Export Bedrock Voxel Shape
features.description: Export the bounding boxes in the project as a bedrock voxel shape file
routes: File > Export > Export Bedrock Voxel Shape

features.name: Export Block/Item Model
features.description: Export a Minecraft Java Edition block or item model

features.name: Export Collada Model (dae)
features.description: Export model and animations as dae file to use it in other 3D applications

features.name: Export FBX Model
features.description: Export model and animations as fbx file to use it in other 3D applications and game engines

features.name: Export glTF Model
features.description: Export model and animations as glTF file for sharing and rendering

features.name: Export Image
features.description: Export your texture as an image file

features.name: Export Java Entity
features.description: Export the entity model as a Java class

features.name: Export Legacy Project
features.description: Export bbmodel file for Blockbench 4

features.name: Export Minecraft Skin
features.description: Export the Minecraft skin as a PNG texture

features.name: Export Modded Entity Animations
features.description: Export animations for a Minecraft Java Edition modded entity model
routes: File > Export > Export Modded Entity Animations
View > Panels > Animations > Export Modded Entity Animations

features.name: Export OBJ Model
features.description: Export a Wavefront OBJ model for rendering

features.name: Export OptiFine JEM
features.description: Export a full OptiFine entity model

features.name: Export OptiFine Part
features.description: Export a single part for an OptiFine model

features.name: Export STL
features.description: Export a STL model for 3D printing

features.name: Share...
features.description: Generate a short link to share your model

features.name: Upload to Sketchfab...
features.description: Upload your model to Sketchfab

features.name: Add Java Block/Item Model
features.description: Add a Minecraft Java block/item model from a json file to the current model
routes: File > Import > Add Java Block/Item Model

features.name: Extruded Texture
features.description: Generate a model by stretching out a texture

features.name: Import Bedrock Voxel Shape
features.description: Add a voxel shape from a json file to the current project
routes: File > Import > Import Bedrock Voxel Shape

features.name: Import OBJ Model
features.description: Imports objects from an OBJ model as meshes

features.name: Import OptiFine Part
features.description: Import an entity part model for OptiFine

features.name: Import Project
features.description: Import another project from a .bbmodel file into the current project

features.name: Bedrock Player Model
features.description: Default bedrock player model for making attachables and player animations
routes: File > New > Loaders > Bedrock Player Model

features.name: New Window
features.description: Opens a new Blockbench window

features.name: Open Model
features.description: Open a model file from your computer

features.name: Plugins...
features.description: Open the plugin store window

features.name: Automatic Updates
features.description: Automatically download new versions and keep Blockbench up-to-date
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Automatic Updates

features.name: Backup Interval
features.description: Interval of the automatic backups in minutes
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Backup Interval

features.name: Backup Retain Duration
features.description: Set how long Blockbench retains old backups in days
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Backup Retain Duration

features.name: Hardware Acceleration
features.description: Outsource rendering tasks to the graphics card
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Hardware Acceleration

features.name: Recent Model Cap
features.description: Maximum number of recent models to remember
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Recent Model Cap

features.name: Update to Pre-releases
features.description: Automatically update to Blockbench beta versions to test new features. Pre-release versions can be unstable, don't enable this option if you rely on Blockbench for work or other important projects.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Application > Update to Pre-releases

features.name: 2D Editor Zoom Speed
features.description: Input sensitivity when zooming in the UV and 2D paint editor
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > 2D Editor Zoom Speed

features.name: Gamepad Controls
features.description: Use a gamepad or 3D mouse to navigate the viewport
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Gamepad Controls

features.name: Select Reference Image on Double Click
features.description: Double click the viewport to select a reference image
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Select Reference Image on Double Click

features.name: Selection Tolerance
features.description: Size of the area that can be clicked to select an edge or vertex
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Selection Tolerance

features.name: Switch Tools on Double Click
features.description: Double click the viewport to switch between tools
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Switch Tools on Double Click

features.name: Unselect when Clicking Background
features.description: Unselects all elements when clicking on the background behind the model or in the timeline
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Unselect when Clicking Background

features.name: Viewport Rotate Speed
features.description: Input sensitivity when rotating in the viewport
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Viewport Rotate Speed

features.name: Viewport Zoom Speed
features.description: Input sensitivity when zooming in the viewport
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Controls > Viewport Zoom Speed

features.name: Animation Snap
features.description: Default snap interval for keyframes in the animation timeline in steps per second. This can also be changed per animation. The default value is 24.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Animation Snap

features.name: Auto UV
features.description: Enable Auto UV by default
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Auto UV

features.name: Cube Size
features.description: Set the default cube size when creating a new cube
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Cube Size

features.name: Default Bedrock Format
features.description: Select the default format to load Minecraft Bedrock models in, when no specific format can be detected from context.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Default Bedrock Format

features.name: Default Java Block/Item Version
features.description: Default format version when creating new Java block/item models or opening files without format version
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Default Java Block/Item Version

features.name: Default Keyframe Interpolation
features.description: Select the default keyframe interpolation mode
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Default Keyframe Interpolation

features.name: Default Minecraft Textures Path
features.description: Folder from where Blockbench loads default textures
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Default Minecraft Textures Path

features.name: Inherit Parent Color
features.description: Set the marker color of a newly created element to the color of the parent instead of a random color
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Inherit Parent Color

features.name: Rename New Element
features.description: Focus name field when creating new element or group
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Rename New Element

features.name: Uniform Scale Keyframes
features.description: Set scale keyframes to uniform scaling by default
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Defaults > Uniform Scale Keyframes

features.name: Invalid Path
features.description: Show the "%0" dialog
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Dialogs > Invalid Path

features.name: Model Too Large
features.description: Show the "%0" dialog
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Dialogs > Model Too Large

features.name: Rotation Limits
features.description: Show the "%0" dialog
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Dialogs > Rotation Limits

features.name: Save Model Format
features.description: Show the "%0" dialog
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Dialogs > Save Model Format

features.name: Texture Import
features.description: Show the "%0" dialog
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Dialogs > Texture Import

features.name: Allow Display Slot Mirroring
features.description: Allow Display slots for Java item models to be mirrored. WARNING: This only works in Minecraft 1.14 or earlier or in special cases.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Allow Display Slot Mirroring

features.name: Auto Keyframe
features.description: Automatically create a keyframe with default values at the timeline start when transforming the bone at a later point
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Auto Keyframe

features.name: Deactivate Size Limit
features.description: Deactivate the size limit for specific model formats. WARNING: This can cause invalid models.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Deactivate Size Limit

features.name: Default Viewport Paste Behavior
features.description: Select the behavior when pasting something into the viewport in Edit mode and multiple options are available
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Default Viewport Paste Behavior

features.name: Detect Flipbook Textures
features.description: Automatically detect flipbook animated textures and preview them as animation
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Detect Flipbook Textures

features.name: Highlight Elements
features.description: Highlight elements when you hover over them or select them
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Highlight Elements

features.name: Link Stretching
features.description: Stretch the cube in all directions with the same value
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Link Stretching

features.name: Local Position Values
features.description: Display all position values in the Transform panel in local space
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Local Position Values

features.name: Modded Entity Integer Size
features.description: Limit cube sizes in the Modded Entity format to integers. While floats are technically supported in some versions, integers are much easier to UV-map.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Modded Entity Integer Size

features.name: Reveal Elements on Select
features.description: Reveal elements in the ouliner when selected
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Reveal Elements on Select

features.name: Transform Cubes from Center
features.description: Edit the cube position values from the center instead of the corner
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Transform Cubes from Center

features.name: Undo Limit
features.description: Number of steps you can undo
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Undo Limit

features.name: Undo Selection
features.description: Track selection changes as a step in the undo history
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Undo Selection

features.name: Vertex Merge Distance
features.description: Distance within which vertices are merged using merging by distance
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Edit > Vertex Merge Distance

features.name: Animation Sample Rate
features.description: Sample rate in samples per second for curves that the respective format does not support natively
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Animation Sample Rate

features.name: Credit Comment
features.description: Add a credit comment to exported files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Credit Comment

features.name: Embed Textures
features.description: Embed texture file content in .bbmodel files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Embed Textures

features.name: Export Asset Paths
features.description: Select how paths to assets such as textures or animations get saved in .bbmodel files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Export Asset Paths

features.name: Export Empty Groups
features.description: Include groups without content in exported files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Export Empty Groups

features.name: Export Groups in Java block/item models
features.description: Save groups in java block or item model JSON files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Export Groups in Java block/item models

features.name: Export Pivots in Java block/item models
features.description: Save pivot points in Java block/item models on cubes without rotation
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Export Pivots in Java block/item models

features.name: Final Newline
features.description: Insert a newline character at the end of exported files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Final Newline

features.name: JSON Indentation
features.description: Indentation style for exported JSON files
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > JSON Indentation

features.name: Minified Export
features.description: Write JSON files in one line
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Minified Export

features.name: Minified Project Files
features.description: Write .bbmodel files minified into one line
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Minified Project Files

features.name: Model Export Scale
features.description: Factor by which the scale of exported glTF, DAE, and FBX models gets reduced. The default is 16, which converts 16 Blockbench units into 1 meter in the export.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Model Export Scale

features.name: OBJ Face Export Mode
features.description: Choose to let the OBJ exporter convert all faces into tris or quads
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > OBJ Face Export Mode

features.name: OptiFine JEM: Export selected texture
features.description: Export the selected texture as the default texture of the model
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > OptiFine JEM: Export selected texture

features.name: Sketchfab Token
features.description: Token to authorize Blockbench to upload to your Sketchfab account
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Export > Sketchfab Token

features.name: Classroom Mode
features.description: Restricts functionality such as installing plugins and removes links to social media
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > General > Classroom Mode

features.name: Language
features.description: Interface language

features.name: Recovery Point Save Interval
features.description: Blockbench regularly saves the open project in the background to recover in case of a computer crash. Set the interval in seconds. Set to 0 to disable saving.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > General > Recovery Point Save Interval

features.name: Streamer Mode
features.description: Hides sensitive information like recent models
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > General > Streamer Mode

features.name: Use CDN Mirror
features.description: Use the mirror CDN to download plugins. The mirror receives updates faster and works in some regions where the default does not work.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > General > Use CDN Mirror

features.name: Username
features.description: Username for edit sessions

features.name: Block Grid
features.description: Show 16x16 block-size grid
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Block Grid

features.name: Block Grid Size
features.description: Size of the block grid
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Block Grid Size

features.name: Ground Plane
features.description: Show a floor plane below the model
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Ground Plane

features.name: Ground Plane Double-sided
features.description: Make the ground plane visible from below
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Ground Plane Double-sided

features.name: Image Editor Grid Size
features.description: Size of the large grid in the 2D image editor
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Image Editor Grid Size

features.name: Precise Block Grid
features.description: Show pixel-precise block grid
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Precise Block Grid

features.name: Show Grids
features.description: Show or hide all 3D grids
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Show Grids

features.name: Size Limit Box
features.description: Show size limit boundaries
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Size Limit Box

features.name: Small Grid
features.description: Show small grid and axes
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Small Grid

features.name: Always Show Splash Art
features.description: Always display the splash art on the start screen
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Always Show Splash Art

features.name: Auto-hide Tab Bar
features.description: Hide the tab bar when only one tab is open
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Auto-hide Tab Bar

features.name: Autocomplete Code
features.description: Display autocomplete suggestions in code editors
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Autocomplete Code

features.name: Display Timecodes as Frame Numbers
features.description: Display fraction timecodes in the timeline as frame number instead of centisecond
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Display Timecodes as Frame Numbers

features.name: Interface Scale
features.description: Scale of the entire Blockbench interface
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Interface Scale

features.name: Mobile Panel Side
features.description: Select which side of the screen panels are displayed on when using Blockbench on in landscape orientation
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Mobile Panel Side

features.name: Motion Trails
features.description: Show motion trails in the animation editor
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Motion Trails

features.name: Outliner Colors
features.description: Display element and group colors in the outliner
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Outliner Colors

features.name: Pivot Marker
features.description: Size of the pivot point marker
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Pivot Marker

features.name: Show Only Selected Bézier Handles
features.description: Hide handles of bézier keyframes that are not currently selected
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Show Only Selected Bézier Handles

features.name: Suggest Modifier Keys in Status Bar
features.description: Display context aware suggested modifier keys in the status bar
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Suggest Modifier Keys in Status Bar

features.name: Transform Gizmo Size
features.description: Size of the transform gizmo
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Transform Gizmo Size

features.name: Transform Sliders in Status Bar
features.description: Display the transform sliders toolbar of the selected tool in the status bar instead of using the Transform panel
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Transform Sliders in Status Bar

features.name: UI Mode
features.description: Interface mode
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > UI Mode

features.name: X-Ray Outlines
features.description: Show outlines through objects
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > X-Ray Outlines

features.name: 2D Brush Cursor
features.description: Display an outline around the brush in the 2D workspace
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > 2D Brush Cursor

features.name: 3D Brush Cursor
features.description: Display an outline around the brush in the 3D workspace
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > 3D Brush Cursor

features.name: Brush Opacity Modifier
features.description: Modify the brush opacity when using a stylus
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Brush Opacity Modifier

features.name: Brush Size Modifier
features.description: Modify the brush size when using a stylus
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Brush Size Modifier

features.name: Color Picker Style
features.description: Select the style of the paint mode color picker
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Color Picker Style

features.name: Color Picker Tool Switch
features.description: When picking a transparent pixel, switch to the eraser. When the eraser was previously selected and a color is picked, switch to the brush
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Color Picker Tool Switch

features.name: Image Editor
features.description: Default image editor to edit textures with
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Image Editor

features.name: Limit Brush Opacity per Stroke
features.description: Limit the opacity that a brush can apply to the value of the opacity slider during each brush stroke. With a smooth brush this behavior can potentially lead to slight unwanted noise.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Limit Brush Opacity per Stroke

features.name: Paint Through Transparency
features.description: Paint through transparent pixels when Lock Alpha Channel is enabled
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Paint Through Transparency

features.name: Paint with Stylus Only
features.description: Only use the stylus for painting, reserve mouse or touch input for navigation.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Paint with Stylus Only

features.name: Pick Color Opacity
features.description: Pick the color opacity with the Color Picker and set it as brush opacity
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Pick Color Opacity

features.name: Pick Combined Color
features.description: Pick the combined color of all layers at the respective pixel, instead of the color on the active layer
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Pick Combined Color

features.name: Restrict Brush to Side
features.description: Restrict brushes to only paint on the current side
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Restrict Brush to Side

features.name: Selection Outlines in Paint Mode
features.description: Display element selection outlines while in paint mode
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Selection Outlines in Paint Mode

features.name: Use Selection Tool to Move Selections
features.description: Allow the Selection Tool to directly move selections, without having to switch to the Move Layer tool
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Paint > Use Selection Tool to Move Selections

features.name: Anti-aliasing
features.description: Toggle anti-aliasing in the preview

features.name: Background Rendering
features.description: Update the preview while the window is not focused
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Background Rendering

features.name: Brightness
features.description: Brightness of the preview. Default is 50

features.name: Camera Near Plane
features.description: The minimum distance from the camera where objects render. Higher values decrease Z-fighting. Default is 1.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Camera Near Plane

features.name: Fix anti-aliasing bleeding
features.description: Fixes texture bleeding when using anti-aliasing. Potentially unsupported on older hardware.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Fix anti-aliasing bleeding

features.name: FOV
features.description: Camera Field of View. Default is 45

features.name: FPS Limit
features.description: Limit how many frames per second Blockbench renders. The actual frame rate is limited to what your device can display.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > FPS Limit

features.name: Minecraft Skin
features.description: Skin used for the reference player model
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Minecraft Skin

features.name: Particle Tick Rate
features.description: Tick rate for particle effects in ticks per second. Default is 30
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Particle Tick Rate

features.name: Play Flipbook Textures in Animation
features.description: Preview animations on flipbook textures in sync with the animation timeline
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Play Flipbook Textures in Animation

features.name: Render Sides
features.description: Select which side of a face is rendered
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Render Sides

features.name: Save View per Tab
features.description: Save the current view angle for each tab separately
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Save View per Tab

features.name: Shading
features.description: Enable shading in the preview

features.name: Timline Scrubbing Audio
features.description: Play short previews of the audio while scrubbing through time timeline
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Timline Scrubbing Audio

features.name: Tone Mapping
features.description: Approximation method for displaying high dynamic range on a standard screen for PBR rendering.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Preview > Tone Mapping

features.name: Volume
features.description: Volume control for sound effects in animations

features.name: Control + Shift Resolution
features.description: Resolution of the grid while holding control and shift
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Control + Shift Resolution

features.name: Control Resolution
features.description: Resolution of the grid while holding control
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Control Resolution

features.name: Grid Resolution
features.description: Resolution of the grid that elements snap to
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Grid Resolution

features.name: Negative Size
features.description: Allow the resize tool to use negative sizes
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Negative Size

features.name: Rectangle Selection: Nearest Edge
features.description: Snap rectangle selections to the nearest pixel edge, like in GIMP, instead of entire pixels.
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Rectangle Selection: Nearest Edge

features.name: Shift Resolution
features.description: Resolution of the grid while holding shift
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Snapping > Shift Resolution

features.name: Settings...
features.description: Open the Blockbench settings dialog.

features.name: Project...
features.description: Opens the project window, where you can edit metadata of your model

features.name: Save Model
features.description: Saves the model, textures and animations by overwriting the files

features.name: Save Project
features.description: Saves the current model as a project file

features.name: Save Project As
features.description: Saves the current model as a project file at a new location

features.name: Save Project With Increment
features.description: Saves the current model as a project file with an increment (ex: project_2.bbmodel)

features.name: About
features.description: Version}

features.name: Reload Blockbench
features.description: Reload Blockbench. This will void all unsaved progress

features.name: Reload Plugins
features.description: Reload all development plugins

features.name: Reset Layout
features.description: Reset the layout to Blockbench's default

features.name: Search and Run Action
features.description: Description

features.name: View Backups
features.description: Browse the list of auto-saved project backups

features.name: Adjust Brightness & Contrast...
features.description: Adjust the brightness and contrast of the selected texture

features.name: Adjust Curves...
features.description: Adjust the brightness curves of the selected texture

features.name: Adjust Opacity...
features.description: Adjust the opacity of the selected texture

features.name: Adjust Saturation & Hue...
features.description: Adjust the saturation and hue of the selected texture

features.name: Clear Unused Texture Space
features.description: Clear parts of the texture that are not UV-mapped to any elements

features.name: Flip Horizontally
features.description: Flip the texture or layer horizontally

features.name: Flip Vertically
features.description: Flip the texture or layer vertically

features.name: Invert Colors
features.description: Invert all colors of the selected texture

features.name: Limit to Palette
features.description: Limits the colors of the texture to those in the currently loaded palette

features.name: Rotate Clockwise
features.description: Rotate the texture or layer clockwise

features.name: Rotate Counter-clockwise
features.description: Rotate the texture or layer counter-clockwise

features.name: Split Alpha Channel into Layer
features.description: Split the alpha channel of the texture into an alpha mask layer
routes: Image > Split Alpha Channel into Layer

features.name: Split RGBA Channels into Layers
features.description: Split the texture into additive layers, one for each RGBA channel
routes: Image > Split RGBA Channels into Layers

features.name: Add Keyframe
features.description: Add a keyframe to the selected animator

features.name: Copy
features.description: Copy the selected selection, face or display settings
routes: View > Panels > UV > Panel Menu > Copy
View > Panels > Collections > Panel Menu > Copy

features.name: Create Keyframe Column
features.description: Key all channels in the timeline at the current timecode, if they already have keyframes

features.name: Paste
features.description: Paste the selected selection, face or display settings
routes: View > Panels > UV > Panel Menu > Paste
View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Paste
View > Panels > Animations > Panel Menu > Paste
View > Panels > Outliner > Panel Menu > Paste
View > Panels > Textures > Panel Menu > Paste

features.name: Reset Keyframe
features.description: Reset all values of the selected keyframes

features.name: Resolve Keyframe
features.description: Resolves the math expressions of the selected keyframes

features.name: Reverse Keyframes
features.description: Reverse the order of the selected keyframes

features.name: Round Keyframe Values
features.description: Round all values of the selected keyframes

features.name: Select Keyframe Column
features.description: Select all keyframes in the timeline along a column below the playhead

features.name: Uniform Scaling
features.description: Enable uniform scaling on the selected keyframes

features.name: Apply Rotation
features.description: Reset the element rotation of the mesh, and apply it to the geometry instead

features.name: Create Face or Edge
features.description: Creates a new face or edge between the selected vertices

features.name: Dissolve Edges
features.description: Dissolve selected edges in a mesh and merge the faces they divide

features.name: Extrude Selection
features.description: Extrude the selected parts of the mesh

features.name: Inset Selection
features.description: Inset the selected parts of the mesh

features.name: Invert Face
features.description: Invert the selected faces to make them face the opposite direction

features.name: Loop Cut
features.description: Split the mesh in a loop across the selected edge

features.name: Merge Meshes
features.description: Merge multiple meshes into one

features.name: Merge Vertices
features.description: Merge the selected vertices into the position of the first selected vertex

features.name: Set Vertex Weights
features.description: Set the vertex weights of the selected vertices to a specific value on a certain armature bone

features.name: Solidify Faces
features.description: Solidify the selected faces of the mesh

features.name: Split Mesh
features.description: Split the selected faces of the mesh into a new mesh

features.name: Switch Face Crease
features.description: Switch in which direction the quad folds in the middle

features.name: Add Custom Skin Pose
features.description: Save the current pose of the model as a pose preset
routes: View > Panels > Pose > Add Custom Skin Pose

features.name: Convert Slim/Wide Skin
features.description: Switch the skin model between the classic wide (steve) model and the slim (alex) model. Optionally auto-adjust the texture to fit the model

features.name: Custom Skin Poses
features.description: Load a custom skin pose preset
routes: View > Panels > Pose > Custom Skin Poses

features.name: Explode Skin Model
features.description: Toggles an explosion view that allows you to edit covered faces
routes: View > Panels > Outliner > Explode Skin Model

features.name: Toggle Skin Layer
features.description: Toggle the hat and clothing layer of the skin model
routes: View > Panels > Outliner > Toggle Skin Layer

features.name: Apply Animation Preset
features.description: Select from a list of animation presets and apply it to the selected bone
routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Apply Animation Preset

features.name: Bring Up All Animators
features.description: Brings all modified animators into the timeline

View > Panels > Timeline > Bring Up All Animators

features.name: Clear Timeline
features.description: Clear all unselected bones from the timeline

features.name: Disable Timeline Range
features.description: Disable the custom playback range in the animation timeline
routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Disable Timeline Range

features.name: Display Other Graphs
features.description: Whether the graphs of the axes that are not selected are displayed

features.name: Filter Channels
features.description: Select the animation channels to display in the timeline

routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Fold All Animators

features.name: Include Other Graphs

features.name: Include Zero Line
features.description: Whether the graph editor always includes the zero line in the view

features.name: Jump to Animation End
routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Jump to Animation End

routes: View > Panels > Timeline > Panel Menu > Jump to Animation Start

features.name: Looped Playback

features.description: Search and execute any available action

features.description: Generate a collision or custom hit test component for Minecraft Bedrock Edition entities

features.description: Generate a collision or selection box component for Minecraft Bedrock Edition blocks

features.name: Edit Predicate Overrides...
features.description: Select models to override this model based on selected conditions

features.name: Color Picker
features.description: Tool to pick the color of pixels on your texture

features.description: Brush to clone parts of your texture or draw patterns. Hold Ctrl and click to select a copy source.

features.description: Tool to draw simple shapes on textures

features.description: Eraser tool to replace colors on a texture with transparency

features.description: Create a color gradient on your texture

features.name: Knife Tool
features.description: Tool to cut mesh faces into smaller pieces

features.name: Move
features.description: Tool to select and move elements

features.name: Move Layer
features.description: Move the current layer or selection

features.name: Paint Brush
features.description: Colored brush to draw on textures

features.name: Paint Bucket
features.description: Paint bucket to fill entire faces with one color

features.name: Pan Tool
features.description: Tool to navigate in the viewport and the texture editor

features.name: Pivot Tool
features.description: Tool to change the pivot point of elements and bones

features.name: Resize
features.description: Tool to select and resize elements

features.name: Rotate
features.description: Tool to select and rotate elements

features.name: Seam Tool
features.description: Tool to define UV seams on mesh edges

features.name: Selection Tool
features.description: Select parts of the image

features.name: Stretch
features.description: Tool to select and stretch elements

features.name: Vertex Snap
features.description: Move one cube to another cube by connecting two vertices

features.name: Weight Brush
features.description: Paint vertex weights on meshes for armature deformations

features.name: Remove Blank Faces
features.description: Deletes all untextured faces of the selection

features.name: Set Cullfaces Automatically
features.description: Automatically generate cullfaces to hide faces when they are covered by the neighboring block.

features.name: Swap Tools
features.description: Switch between alternative tools, like move and resize, or brush and color picker

features.name: Center Lateral
features.description: Center the selected elements on the X and Z axis

features.name: Mirror UV
features.description: Toggle the UV mirroring on the X axis of the selected cubes

features.name: Toggle Auto UV
features.description: Toggle the auto UV setting of the selected elements

features.name: Toggle Export
features.description: Toggle the export setting of the selected elements

features.name: Toggle Lock
features.description: Toggle whether the selected elements are locked

features.name: Toggle Shading
features.description: Toggle the shading of the selected cubes

features.name: Toggle Visibility
features.description: Toggle the visibility of the selected elements

routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Rotation Z

features.name: Size %0
features.description: Resize elements on the %0 axis
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Size X

features.name: Size %0
features.description: Resize elements on the %0 axis
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Size Y

features.name: Size %0
features.description: Resize elements on the %0 axis
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Size Z

features.name: Stretch
features.description: Stretches cubes multiplicatively on the %0 axis without changing the UV
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Stretch X

features.name: Stretch
features.description: Stretches cubes multiplicatively on the %0 axis without changing the UV
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Stretch Y

features.name: Stretch
features.description: Stretches cubes multiplicatively on the %0 axis without changing the UV
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Slider Stretch Z

features.name: Toggle Stretch Linked
routes: View > Panels > Transform > Toggle Stretch Linked

features.name: Apply To All Faces
features.description: Applies the settings of the current face to all faces
routes: View > Panels > UV > Apply To All Faces

features.name: Move Texture with UV
features.description: Move the texture of the face along when dragging UV faces
routes: View > Panels > UV > Move Texture with UV

features.name: Remove Face
features.description: Removes the current face

features.name: UV Mirror X
features.description: Mirrors the UV of this face on the X axis
routes: View > Panels > UV > UV Mirror X

features.name: UV Mirror Y
features.description: Mirrors the UV of this face on the Y axis
routes: View > Panels > UV > UV Mirror Y

features.name: UV Rotation
features.description: Rotation of the UV face

features.name: Pixel Grid
features.description: Show texture pixel grid on elements in edit mode
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Pixel Grid

features.name: Pixel Grid
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Grid > Pixel Grid

features.name: Preview Checkerboard
features.description: Toggle the checkerboard background behind the preview
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Preview Checkerboard

features.name: Preview Checkerboard
routes: File > Preferences > Settings > Interface > Preview Checkerboard

features.name: Preview Scene
features.description: Change the model preview scene

features.name: Record GIF...
features.description: Record an animated GIF of the model from the current angle

features.name: Screenshot App
features.description: Take a screenshot of the whole application

features.name: Screenshot Model
features.description: Take a cropped screenshot of the model from the current angle

features.name: Split Screen
features.description: Select a viewport split screen mode

features.name: Timelapse...
features.description: Record a timelapse of your modeling process

features.name: Show Grids
features.description: Show or hide all 3D grids

features.name: Ground Plane
features.description: Show a floor plane below the model

features.name: Shading
features.description: Enable shading in the preview

features.name: Toggle Sidebars
features.description: Enable or disable the sidebars

features.name: View Mode
features.description: Change the model view mode
